ticker: GSK (LSE/NYSE); NYSE listing information for GSK (reference; source needed))
aging_relevance_reasoning: GSK has meaningful aging-adjacent exposure through (1) immunology/anti-inflammatory medicines that target pathways implicated in age-related chronic inflammation; FDA Prescribing Information: NUCALA (mepolizumab) (reference); FDA Prescribing Information: BENLYSTA (belimumab) (reference)), (2) a major vaccine franchise with products indicated for older adults, including SHINGRIX for prevention of herpes zoster in adults aged 50 years and older (reference)), and (3) historical direct longevity-mechanism programs via the Sirtris sirtuin-activator platform acquired by GSK (reference); Milne JC et al., Nature 2007 (reference; includes SRT1720 as a SIRT1 activator)). However, GSK does not publicly position a major current R&D pillar explicitly as geroscience or aging-as-an-indication.

existing_longevity_assets.indication: Prevention of herpes zoster (shingles) in adults aged 50 years and older; and in adults aged 18 years and older who are or will be at increased risk of herpes zoster due to immunodeficiency or immunosuppression
existing_longevity_assets.relevance: Aging-adjacent via immunoprotection in older adults (immunosenescence context), potentially impacting morbidity associated with age-related decline in immune function
existing_longevity_assets.source: FDA Prescribing Information (label): SHINGRIX (Zoster Vaccine Recombinant, Adjuvanted) (reference; source needed for URL)

existing_longevity_assets.indication: Severe eosinophilic asthma and other eosinophil-driven diseases (see label for full indications)
existing_longevity_assets.relevance: Anti-inflammatory biologic (IL-5 pathway) relevant to the 'chronic_inflammation' hallmark as an aging-modifying mechanism class (inflammation modulation), though not developed as a longevity therapy
existing_longevity_assets.source: FDA Prescribing Information (label): NUCALA (mepolizumab) (reference; source needed for URL)

existing_longevity_assets.indication: Systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) and lupus nephritis (see label for full indications)
existing_longevity_assets.relevance: Immune/inflammation modulation (BAFF/BLyS inhibition) relevant to age-associated immune dysregulation and inflammatory signaling, though not developed as a longevity therapy
existing_longevity_assets.source: FDA Prescribing Information (label): BENLYSTA (belimumab) (reference; source needed for URL)

existing_longevity_assets.relevance: Direct mechanistic linkage to sirtuin activation, a commonly cited longevity pathway; included due to GSK's acquisition of Sirtris and reported SIRT1-activating chemistry in the Sirtris program
existing_longevity_assets.source: Milne JC et al. Nature (2007) (reference; source needed for URL); GSK press release/reference: 'GlaxoSmithKline to acquire Sirtris Pharmaceuticals, Inc.' (2008) (reference; source needed for URL)

recent_acquisitions.relevance: Respiratory medicine expansion (camlipixant for refractory chronic cough), aging-adjacent because chronic cough burden increases with age
recent_acquisitions.source: GSK press release/reference: 'GSK to acquire BELLUS Health Inc.' (Feb 2023) (reference; source needed for URL)

recent_acquisitions.relevance: Vaccine platform/portfolio expansion (MAPS technology) potentially relevant to older-adult vaccination and immune decline with aging
recent_acquisitions.source: GSK press release/reference: 'GSK to acquire Affinivax, Inc.' (Jun 2022) (reference; source needed for URL)

recent_acquisitions.relevance: Oncology/hematology expansion (momelotinib for myelofibrosis); aging-adjacent since many hematologic malignancies increase with age
recent_acquisitions.source: GSK press release/reference: 'GSK to acquire Sierra Oncology, Inc.' (Apr 2022) (reference; source needed for URL)

acquisition_pattern.preferred_stage: Primarily clinical-stage specialty-medicine targets plus strategic platform additions (inferred from acquisitions of Bellus (late-stage clinical respiratory), Sierra (late-stage hematology/oncology), and Affinivax (vaccine platform)) (sources: GSK press release/reference: 'GSK to acquire BELLUS Health Inc.' (Feb 2023); GSK press release/reference: 'GSK to acquire Sierra Oncology, Inc.' (Apr 2022); GSK press release/reference: 'GSK to acquire Affinivax, Inc.' (Jun 2022))
acquisition_pattern.recent_trend: Recent M&A has emphasized bolt-on deals aligned to stated core areas (respiratory/immune, vaccines, oncology) rather than explicit aging-as-an-indication programs (sources: GSK plc Annual Report 2023 (reference; source needed for exact page); GSK acquisition press releases referenced above).
